title: Squeebs N' Stuff
description: A mod that adds another ender friend to your Minecraft world!
body:
# ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3324fe6ba82dfb52431fb1b1c57930b1b2a1c1d.png)
**Squeebs N’ Stuff** is a mod that adds a new creature to your world
This creature is called a **Squeeb**.

![Squeeb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2067343322c84a9cb4a5e230deb3c2057b47db6.gif)

The Squeeb is found in its nest in the **end dimension**.
Its nests are seen under the small end islands dangling over the void making them hard to get to. However their nests contain great loot, some of which can help you traverse the end.
![A Squeeb nest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb93af6e1d4df0e054a444031b245abeb11377c4_0.webp)

Squeeb nests are made entirely out of their own spit. This hardened spit is called gelith, and can be used to make many new blocks. Squeebs also like to hide stuff in this gelith forming stashes which can be mined. These stashes contain very good loot such as ender pearls, chorus fruit, **Squeeb treats**, and blocks.

However you can make much better use of these little guys by taming them using popped chorus fruit. Taming a Squeeb will allow the owner to right click and pick up the squeeb. When in the hand of the player the player can use the squeeb as a weapon to fight other creatures.

![Holding Squeeb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92209917945b97b91e8f570ee415b7936ba9def8.png)

But If you want to get more use out of your Squeeb you can use the **Squeeb treats** you found in the nest to change how your squeeb functions in your hand. Some Squeeb treats provide a spray of bullets to be fired while others cause a massive bullet to be fired.

All of this helps to introduce a fun new creature to your world to help spice up the monotone gameplay of the end.
